title: Nellie the Beautiful Cloak Model
writer: Owen Davis, Carey Wilson, H.H. Van Loan
actors: Claire Windsor, Edmund Lowe, Mae Busch
plot: Badly mistreated by her father, Nellie Horton is taken in charge by Thomas Lipton. She grows up in poverty not knowing her true identity as the heiress to her mother's millions. Upon the death of her benefactor, she becomes a mode...
